title: Telemetry Invocation/Outcome Event
description: One JSONL line in evals/telemetry/events-YYYY-MM.jsonl. Written by scripts/telemetry/log-invocation.js (event=invocation, on PostToolUse for Skill/Task calls) and scripts/telemetry/log-outcome.js (event=outcome on UserPromptSubmit correction heuristic; event=session_end on Stop/SessionEnd close-out). Never contains raw prompt or transcript text — see scripts/telemetry/redact.js.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this event was recorded

session_id.description: Claude Code session_id from the hook event payload

invocation_id.description: UUID identifying one skill/agent invocation. Required when event=invocation or event=outcome — links an outcome back to the invocation it judges. Absent on event=session_end (see invocation_ids instead).

name.description: Skill or agent name (Skill: tool_input.skill; Task/Agent: tool_input.subagent_type). Required when event=invocation or event=outcome.

event.description: invocation: one Skill/Task tool call recorded by log-invocation.js. outcome: a correction/disposition signal recorded by log-outcome.js on a later prompt. session_end: a close-out record written by log-outcome.js on Stop/SessionEnd.

context_hash.description: sha256 hex digest of the raw prompt/tool-input text this event derives from. Never the raw text itself. Optional — present only when a text source was available to hash.

duration_ms.description: Optional. Present only when derivable from hook event fields.

artifacts.description: Repo-relative artifact paths only (no absolute paths, no paths outside the repo root). Present on event=invocation when the tool_response mentions files written/created.

followed_by_correction.description: True when a later prompt in the same session referenced one of this invocation's artifacts and used revision language.

user_disposition.description: revised: correction heuristic fired. rejected: reserved for aggregator-derived signals (e.g. artifact absent at session close-out). accepted/unknown: no correction signal observed.

confidence.description: Heuristic confidence — never treat as ground truth. See docs/telemetry-privacy.md.

artifact_census.description: Present only when event=session_end. Final existence check for artifacts recorded by invocation_ids during this session.

invocation_ids.description: Present only when event=session_end. The invocation_id(s) this close-out record covers.
